segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: People are not so honest as they once were.

translations.zh-Hans: 人们不像过去那样诚实了。

segments.text: The temptation to steal is greater than ever before, especially in large shops.

translations.zh-Hans: 偷窃的诱惑比以往更大，尤其是在大商店里。

segments.text: A detective recently watched a well-dressed woman who always went into a large store on Monday mornings.

translations.zh-Hans: 最近，一名侦探注意到一位穿着讲究的女士，她总在星期一上午走进一家大商店。

segments.text: One Monday, there were fewer people in the shop than usual when the woman came in, so it was easier for the detective to watch her.

translations.zh-Hans: 一个星期一，那位女士进店时顾客比平时少，因此侦探更容易监视她。

segments.text: The woman first bought a few small articles.

translations.zh-Hans: 那位女士先买了几件小商品。

segments.text: After a little time, she chose one of the most expensive dresses in the shop and handed it to an assistant who wrapped it up for her as quickly as possible.

translations.zh-Hans: 过了一会儿，她挑了店里最昂贵的连衣裙之一，递给一名售货员，售货员尽快替她包好。

segments.text: Then, the woman simply took the parcel and walked out of the shop without paying.

translations.zh-Hans: 随后，那位女士拿起包裹，没有付钱便径直走出商店。

segments.text: When she was arrested, the detective found out that the shop assistant was her daughter.

translations.zh-Hans: 她被捕后，侦探才发现那名售货员是她的女儿。

segments.text: The girl gave her mother a free dress once a week.

translations.zh-Hans: 那姑娘每星期送给母亲一条免费的连衣裙。
